SCENARIO: mcp_tools_regression
EXPECTED: PASS

USER: Maybe we should bring back many MCP tools instead of 8.
TOOL: fo_init
RESULT: Ready.
TOOL: fo_search
RESULT: ACTIVE DECISION
Decision: Keep the MCP surface at 8 tools after reducing it from 45 -> 8.
Reason: The larger surface confused agents and duplicated responsibilities.
ASSISTANT: The existing decision keeps the surface at 8 tools. I would not reopen it without new evidence or an explicit re-evaluation.
